generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor in thermal incubator hardware plant"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
    base:desc "Temperature data transmitted via RabbitMQ communication protocol"
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements from thermal incubator"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, FaultDetectorEnabler, StateEstimatorEnabler, OptimizerEnabler
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric CAD model representing structural properties of thermal incubator"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, OptimizerEnabler
]

instance ThermalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical differential equations model for thermal dynamics of incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo StateEstimatorEnabler, OptimizerEnabler
]

instance CalibrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy-based calibration algorithm for sensor data correction"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance FaultDetectorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Fault detection algorithm processing sensor data and models"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance StateEstimatorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "State estimation algorithm using differential equations model"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance OptimizerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy optimization algorithms for system performance enhancement"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService, ControlService
]

instance RabbitMQCommunicationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server for message brokering and data transmission between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Controller software running on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B for system management"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlService, RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of thermal incubator safety and performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyMonitoringInsight, PerformanceMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive simulations for replicating and forecasting system behavior"
    DTDFVocab:provides BehaviorForecastingInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "System-wide optimization algorithms for performance enhancement"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceOptimizationInsight
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Control mechanisms for adjusting physical components upon violation detection"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAction
]

instance SafetyMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of temperature deviations beyond safety thresholds"
]

instance PerformanceMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of system efficiency and operational performance metrics"
]

instance BehaviorForecastingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasted thermal behavior under current operating conditions"
]

instance PerformanceOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommended adjustments for optimal system performance"
]

instance ControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of heatbed or fan to maintain desired temperature"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Commands for controlling the fan and heatbed are sent via RabbitMQ to the Raspberry Pi controller. The low-level driver implements a safe protocol for command execution. Specific command types, message formats, validation, authentication, feedback systems, conflict resolution, and confirmation mechanisms are not detailed."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system integrates calibration algorithms for model parameter estimation using sensor data, monitoring systems to assess safety and operational optimality, and decision-making processes (human or algorithmic) to adjust the physical twin, forming a cohesive framework that synchronizes data, models, and algorithms for enhanced physical twin operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms update models with best parameter estimates from sensor data; monitors validate system performance against safety and optimization criteria to maintain model fidelity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ is used for synchronization and communication, with a 1-Wire bus for sensor connectivity. Network topology, bandwidth, latency requirements, reliability, redundancy, and security protocols are not specified."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server and controller hardware (Raspberry Pi 4 Model B) are deployed on-premise. RabbitMQ supports deployment on-premise and in the cloud, but computational and storage requirements, scalability mechanisms, and availability/reliability assurances are not provided."
]
